channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kano Central APC Senate Race Faces Contest as Zaura Rejects Consensus
item.description: The Kano Central APC senatorial race don turn gbege as Abdulsalam Abdulkarim Zaura, wey dem sabi as AA Zaura, don reject the consensus wey put former governor Ibrahim Shekarau forward. Last week, six ...

item.title: Princess of Wales Embarks on First Overseas Visit Since Cancer Recovery to Promote Early Childhood Education
item.description: The Princess of Wales, Catherine, will make her first official international trip since her cancer recovery with a visit to Reggio Emilia, Italy. This marks a personal milestone for the princess, who ...

item.title: House of Representatives is not under martial law; video misrepresents the situation
item.description: A recent video claiming that the Philippine House of Representatives is under martial law is false. The video, posted by the YouTube channel 'JAY GUEVARRA TV,' suggested that the Marcos administration...

item.title: Malacañang assures Bato dela Rosa of lawful protection under Marcos administration
item.description: Malacañang has assured Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa that the administration of President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. remains fair and committed to upholding the law, regardless of a person's po...

item.title: Middle East tensions and Hormuz tolls threaten Nigeria's import supply and inflation
item.description: Nigeria dey face serious wahala as tension for Middle East and toll wey Iran don start for Strait of Hormuz dey push up cost of imports sharply. The Persian Gulf Strait Authority wey Iran manage don b...

item.title: Strathcona County Maintains Combined Fire and Paramedic Services Despite Reduced Provincial Funding
item.description: Strathcona County council has decided to continue operating its integrated fire and paramedic services despite reductions in provincial funding for municipal ambulance contracts. The decision, passed ...

item.title: Bangladesh Faces Widespread Contraceptive Shortages Due to Administrative Failures
item.description: Bangladesh, once lauded for its successful family planning system, is now grappling with severe shortages of contraceptives, raising concerns over unplanned pregnancies in its densely populated areas....

item.title: Trump criticises media amid ongoing Iran-US conflict and UK deploys forces to Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the United States and Iran has intensified diplomatic and military tensions in the Middle East. Former US President Donald Trump has publicly criticised the American media...

item.title: Sam Altman Testifies in Musk Lawsuit Over OpenAI's Corporate Decisions
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman testified in court defending himself against a lawsuit from former co-founder Elon Musk, who is challenging OpenAI's corporate structure. Musk claimed that the creation of a for-...

item.title: House Committee Approves Kalinga Program to Support Filipinos During Oil Price Surges
item.description: The House Ad Hoc Committee on Legislative Energy Action and Development (LEAD) has approved the Kalinga bill, a measure aimed at helping Filipinos cope with rising oil prices caused by the ongoing Mid...

item.title: North Carolina Resident Evacuated for Monitoring After Hantavirus Exposure on Cruise Ship
item.description: A North Carolina resident is among the Americans who were evacuated to Nebraska for monitoring following exposure to a deadly hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship. The North Carolina Department of Hea...

item.title: ADC urges probe into alleged N800 billion FAAC mismanagement amid FG’s loan talks
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don raise alarm say President Bola Ahmed Tinubu and APC governors fit don divert over N800 billion from FAAC allocations for 2027 political purposes. The party ya...

item.title: Montreal Victoire Wins 2-1 Over Minnesota Frost to Reach First PWHL Final
item.description: In an exciting playoff matchup, Montreal Victoire secured a 2-1 victory against Minnesota Frost, advancing to the PWHL final for the first time in the team's history. The decisive moment came when Pou...

item.title: Senator Bato Dela Rosa appeals to PMA alumni amid ICC arrest warrant
item.description: Senator Ronald 'Bato' Dela Rosa recently performed parts of the Philippine Military Academy (PMA) hymn during an interview with Unang Balita. He appealed to fellow PMA graduates, also known as cavalie...

item.title: The growing challenges faced by lollipop people due to aggressive driving
item.description: Lollipop people in Britain, responsible for helping children cross the road safely, are increasingly encountering abusive and dangerous behaviour from drivers. Incidents range from verbal insults and ...

item.title: Starmer outlines 35 bills in King’s speech amid leadership pressure
item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer is set to reveal a package of 35 bills in the forthcoming King’s Speech, seeking to regain political momentum despite growing pressure from his own MPs for his resignation....

item.title: Nollywood Stars Pay Tribute to Late Alex Ekubo
item.description: Nollywood don enter deep mourning as actor Alex Ekubo, known as 'Ikuku', don pass away. Many industry colleagues and fans don express deep shock and sadness for this sudden loss. Actress and filmmaker...

item.title: Medicare launches AI-focused payment program to improve chronic care outcomes
item.description: Medicare has introduced ACCESS (Advancing Chronic Care with Effective, Scalable Solutions), a 10-year pilot program designed to test AI-driven healthcare at a federal level. Unlike traditional Medicar...

item.title: Senator Bato dela Rosa appeals for support from PMA classmates amid ICC case
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa, a graduate of the Philippine Military Academy (PMA) Sinagtala Class of 1986, sang the PMA hymn at the Senate on May 13, 2026, as part of his appe...

item.title: PNP Reminds Officers to Stay Politically Neutral Following ICC Warrant on Dela Rosa
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has reminded its personnel to avoid posting political content online, following the issuance of an International Criminal Court (ICC) arrest warrant against former...
